question: Will the S&P 500 AGAIN decrease by over 5% in one day in 2025?
resolution_criteria:
After April 4, 2025, this will happen again.

Resolution Criteria: The market will be based on closing prices only, comparing the close to close price movement from one day to the next.

Intraday Prices: Any price movements within the trading day will not be considered.

Update 2025-11-16 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): Weekend closes count: The market will consider close-to-close price movements from Friday to Monday as a single day-to-day comparison for the purposes of determining if there was a >5% decrease.
